key.name: toggle-clipboard
key.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens the clipboard history popup (Windows uses Win+V).

key.name: history-size
key.description: Maximum number of unpinned entries kept in history. Pinned items are always kept. Windows keeps 25.

key.name: capture-images
key.description: Also remember images copied to the clipboard (PNG/JPEG/etc.), up to 4 MB each.

key.name: paste-on-select
key.description: When you pick an item, type it straight into the focused app (sends Ctrl+V). If off, the item is only placed on the clipboard and you paste yourself.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show a clipboard icon in the top bar for quick access.

key.name: paste-as-plain-text
key.description: Strip rich formatting and paste everything as plain text.

key.name: private-mode
key.description: When on, new clipboard contents are not recorded.

key.name: notify-on-copy
key.description: Show a brief notification each time something is added to history.
